headline: Wells Fargo Turns More Bullish on Nucor (NUE)
summary: Nucor Corporation (NYSE:NUE) is included among the 10 Most Volatile Stocks to Buy in S&P 500. Nucor Corporation (NYSE:NUE) is an American manufacturer of steel, specializing in low-embodied carbon EAF steel products and capabilities that drive the circular economy. On June 4, Wells Fargo raised its price target on Nucor Corporation (NYSE:NUE) from $244 to […]
